channel.title: Lake Houston Brewery
channel.description: Upcoming events for Lake Houston Brewery

item.title: Sunday Brunch!
item.description:
Sunday, July 5, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: 10614 FM 1960 W, Humble, TX 77338

Espresso Martini's, Chicken and Waffles, Shrimp n/ Grits, Mimosa's, MAN-Mosa's and more!

Event details
